tickets.title: Add roll_forward_replay error cases
tickets.description: Add tests in tests/test_persistence.py (e.g., test_roll_forward_replay_missing_checkpoint, test_roll_forward_replay_missing_snapshot) to assert ok=false with reason 'checkpoint not found'/'snapshot not found' and validate the returned path.

tickets.title: Add continue_state_rebuild default session selection
tickets.description: Add a tests/test_persistence.py case where events contain multiple session.start entries; call continue_state_rebuild without session_id and assert the state reflects the latest session.start (session_id + last_action/next_step).

tickets.title: Add tools/call arguments type validation test
tickets.description: Add a tests/test_main.py case that sends tools/call with arguments as a non-object (e.g., list/string) and asserts handle_request raises ValueError.

tickets.title: Add repo_commit_message_suggest empty diff case
tickets.description: Add a tests/test_main.py case for repo_commit_message_suggest(diff="") asserting a suggestions list is returned and files is an empty list (and diff echoes "").
